findings.title: SPRINT-2026-05-B missing 9+ days after previous sprint ended — IFleet work queue has no active sprint
findings.detail: .omc/STATUS.md explicitly flags this as 9 days overdue and a hard blocker. Without an active sprint, IFleet workers have no queue and Factory's coordination-of-record value is zero. This requires human action from Sebastian/Esme and cannot be automated.
findings.fix_sketch: Sebastian + Esme create SPRINT-2026-05-B with honest re-plan of M-001..M-015 based on actual velocity after Esme's Retell R1 decision.

findings.title: Retell R1 research 10+ days overdue — ADR-0006 still pending Esme confirmation
findings.detail: ROADMAP.md Q3 open question flags this as ACTION REQUIRED. ADR-0006 status remains pending. All voice-discovery work (M-005+) is blocked. Requires Esme's research findings to be filed in a new ADR or ADR-0006 to be marked confirmed.
findings.fix_sketch: Esme files R1 findings in a new ADR (0011+) OR flips ADR-0006 status to confirmed with timestamp.

findings.title: ADR-0011 example in AGENTS.md references a non-existent ADR number
findings.detail: AGENTS.md §9 used ADR-0011 as a concrete example for commit message convention, but docs/decisions/ only contains ADRs 0001-0010. Using a specific nonexistent number confuses readers who search for it.
findings.fix_sketch: Replace ADR-0011 example with generic NNNN placeholder.

findings.title: DECISIONS.md stats show stale '0 days' average age from initial commit
findings.detail: DECISIONS.md line 46 shows 'Average age (accepted): 0 days (initial commit)' but ADRs are now ~18 days old. Static stale stats undermine trust in the document as a live index.
findings.fix_sketch: Mark as NOT COMPUTED pending generator wiring.

findings.title: ENV.md STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY purpose field ambiguous about NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix
findings.detail: The purpose column mentioned the NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY name inline but didn't clarify that NEXT_PUBLIC_ is added at deploy time by Next.js, not part of the stored vault name. This confusion could lead to mis-named secrets in 1Password.
findings.fix_sketch: Clarify that NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix is added at deploy time, not part of the stored name.

findings.title: FILE_STRUCTURE.md uses ambiguous 'imperative-noun' naming convention descriptor
findings.detail: The table entry for server actions used 'imperative-noun' which could be read as noun+verb (subscriptionCreate) or verb+noun (createSubscription). The example was clear but the term was not.

findings.title: UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md missing 'PITCH' and 'MADR' definitions
findings.detail: INTAKE.md references 'PITCH' as a destination for team-authored feature ideas, but the term was undefined in the glossary. Similarly, MADR is used throughout ADRs and DECISIONS.md but not defined as a term.
findings.fix_sketch: Add PITCH and MADR entries to the glossary.

findings.title: RISKS.md R-012 references STAKEHOLDERS escalation paths but reference is one-directional
findings.detail: R-012 (Sebastian unavailable) points to STAKEHOLDERS.md escalation paths, but that section had no back-reference to R-012. Maintenance changes to one would not prompt updates to the other.
findings.fix_sketch: Add a comment to STAKEHOLDERS.md escalation paths noting the RISKS.md R-012 context.
